name: fuji
description: Fuji Electric is a leading Japanese manufacturer of power semiconductors, specializing in IGBT modules, discrete IGBTs, IPM modules, and SiC MOSFETs. With over 90 years of experience, Fuji Electric provides high-reliability power solutions for industrial drives, renewable energy, electric vehicles, and railway applications.
longDescription: Founded in 1923, Fuji Electric has established itself as a pioneer in power electronics technology. The company's power semiconductor division offers a comprehensive portfolio including IGBT modules (6th and 7th generation), discrete IGBTs, intelligent power modules (IPM), and cutting-edge SiC MOSFETs. Fuji's products are renowned for their exceptional reliability, high efficiency, and advanced thermal management capabilities. The company's IGBT modules are widely used in industrial inverters, servo drives, UPS systems, and renewable energy applications. As an authorized Fuji Electric distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services for the Chinese market.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor for Fuji Electric?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor for Fuji Electric. We have established a direct partnership with Fuji Electric and provide genuine products with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization ensures you receive authentic Fuji power semiconductor products with complete documentation, application notes, and after-sales service. We can provide authorization certificates upon request for your verification.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us to verify our distributor credentials or request a quotation for Fuji Electric products.

faqs.question: What are Fuji's main product categories?
faqs.answer: Fuji Electric specializes in four main product categories: (1) IGBT Modules - 6th and 7th generation modules including 2-Pack, 6-Pack, and PIM configurations for industrial drives, renewable energy, and EV applications. (2) Discrete IGBTs - High-performance single IGBTs in TO-247 and TO-3P packages for power conversion and motor control. (3) IPM Modules - Intelligent Power Modules integrating IGBTs, gate drivers, and protection circuits for simplified inverter design. (4) SiC MOSFETs - Silicon Carbide devices for next-generation high-efficiency systems including EV chargers and solar inverters. Fuji's products cover voltage ranges from 600V to 3300V with industry-leading reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories or contact our FAE team for product recommendations based on your application.

faqs.question: How is the quality and reliability of Fuji Electric products?
faqs.answer: Fuji Electric maintains world-class quality standards: (1) Certifications - ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949 automotive quality, and UL safety certifications. (2) Manufacturing excellence - advanced production facilities in Japan with strict quality control. (3) Reliability testing - comprehensive HTOL, HAST, temperature cycling, and power cycling tests. (4) Field proven - billions of device-hours in industrial and automotive applications. (5) 7th generation technology - latest IGBT technology with optimized trade-off between conduction and switching losses. (6) Technical support - extensive application notes, simulation models, and reference designs. Fuji's products are known for exceptional reliability in demanding industrial environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request quality certifications and reliability reports for specific product families.

faqs.question: What industries does Fuji Electric serve?
faqs.answer: Fuji Electric serves four major industry segments: (1) Industrial Drives - IGBT modules for variable frequency drives, servo systems, and CNC machines. Fuji is a leading supplier to major industrial equipment manufacturers. (2) Renewable Energy - power modules for solar inverters (residential to utility-scale), wind power converters, and energy storage systems. (3) Transportation - traction IGBT modules for railway systems, EV/HEV powertrains, and marine propulsion. Fuji's high-reliability modules are used in bullet trains and metro systems worldwide. (4) Power Supplies - UPS systems, welding machines, and medical power supplies. Fuji's diverse portfolio enables comprehensive solutions across these industries.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for industry-specific application support and reference designs.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Fuji Electric products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive technical support for Fuji Electric products: (1) Product selection - helping choose the right Fuji modules for your application including voltage, current, and package selection. (2) Application circuit design - reviewing inverter designs, gate drive circuits, and protection schemes. (3) Thermal design assistance - providing guidance on heatsink selection, thermal interface materials, and cooling system design. (4) Simulation support - providing SPICE models and thermal simulation data. (5) PCB layout review - optimizing layout for switching performance and EMI reduction. (6) Debugging support - troubleshooting issues during prototype bring-up and testing. (7) Reference designs - sharing proven circuit topologies for common applications. (8) Cross-reference support - helping migrate from other brands to Fuji alternatives.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for technical support and application guidance.

faqs.question: How can I request samples or get a quotation for Fuji Electric products?
faqs.answer: You can request samples or quotations through multiple channels: (1) Online form - submit your inquiry through our website contact form with your application details. (2) Email - send your requirements including part numbers, quantities, and application information to our sales team. (3) Phone - call our customer service hotline for immediate assistance. (4) WeChat - add our official WeChat account for quick communication. For sample requests, please provide project information, estimated annual usage, and technical requirements. Our team responds to inquiries within 24 hours during business days. Standard lead time for samples is 2-3 weeks from Japan; production quantities typically 6-8 weeks.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us today to request samples or get a quotation for your Fuji Electric product needs.
